raw_consumer_statement:
I received a fraud transaction on my Citi Bank Visa. I contacted Citi Bank which they are doing nothing. They are giving me a run around to dispute & remove this fraud charge. 
They give me other phone numbers to call which I am put on hold & my call is never picked up. 
When I call to make my credit card bank aware of a fraud/scam charge, I expect my credit card company to take care of this, Citi Bank is not providing me this service.
